main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative degradation por ClO2 + reduction by-products clorito + descarga piscifactoría' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (biofouling, cloro libre intermitente, envejecimiento, MECH O-ring).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar SBS 4→8-10 mg/L emergency + Fenton-like FeSO4 1-2 mg/L Fe2+ — match gold (aumentar SBS + alternativa).

requested_data.justification: Pide ClO2 específico amperométrico/Palintest DPD/glicina — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: ClO2 <0.01 + probing vasos localizados → MECH switch.
